tasks.subject: PW-A-CR-T1: terminal request_id helper (crawler, TDD)
tasks.description:

**Repo/cwd:** RAG-HP-PUB at D:\DevHellopro\Workspaces\RAG-HP-PUB (separate git; EN commits).

tasks.subject: PW-A-CR-T2: wire request_id + persist into both senders
tasks.description:
**Goal:** _send_success_webhook (L921) + _send_stop_webhook (L1010) attach shared request_id and set_json persist before send.

**Repo/cwd:** RAG-HP-PUB at D:\DevHellopro\Workspaces\RAG-HP-PUB (EN commits).

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py
- Test: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py (source-inspection tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- both senders: params['request_id']=_get_or_create_terminal_webhook_request_id(job_info); await cache_service.set_json(f"{CRAWL_JOB_PREFIX}{crawl_id}", job_info) BEFORE the retry send
- source-inspection tests assert helper+request_id+set_json on each sender
- no regressions (full file pytest)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both senders wire request_id + set_json before send", "source-inspection tests pass", "no regressions"], "repo": "RAG-HP-PUB", "cwd": "D:\\DevHellopro\\Workspaces\\RAG-HP-PUB", "commit": "EN, repo convention"}
```
